LanguageData.SplitTheRaid.ModDisabledTooltip: When enabled, the mod will not create any new extra raids. Already scheduled raids will still occur. You can clear them in the Debug menu.
LanguageData.SplitTheRaid.AffectAllyRaidsTooltip: If disabled, friendly raids will not be modified.
LanguageData.SplitTheRaid.AffectQuestRaidsTooltip: If disabled, quest raids will not be modified.
LanguageData.SplitTheRaid.KeepSameFactionTooltip: If enabled, all extra raids will use the same faction as the original raid. If disabled, faction is randomized.
LanguageData.SplitTheRaid.KeepSameStrategyTooltip: If enabled, all extra raids will use the same strategy (e.g., ImmediateAttack, Siege). If disabled, the strategy is randomized.
LanguageData.SplitTheRaid.KeepSameArrivalModeTooltip: If enabled, extra raids will use the same arrival method (on foot, drop pods, etc.) If disabled, the arrival method is randomized.
LanguageData.SplitTheRaid.KeepSameSpawnLocationToolti: If enabled, extra raids will arrive at the same spawn location.
LanguageData.SplitTheRaid.MinPointsAmountToSplit: Minimum raid points to allow splitting:
LanguageData.SplitTheRaid.TableDescription: Hover over columns for more info.
LanguageData.SplitTheRaid.CheckExtraTooltip: Allow extra raids for this strategy
LanguageData.SplitTheRaid.CheckPointsTooltip: Allow points modification for this strategy
LanguageData.SplitTheRaid.CheckRandomTooltip: If "Keep the same raid strategy" is set to False, allow this strategy to be randomly picked.\n\nIf no valid strategy is available (e.g., due to faction restrictions or missing mods), the raid strategy will not be changed.
LanguageData.SplitTheRaid.StrategyMissingTooltip: This strategy is not available (mod may have been removed).
LanguageData.SplitTheRaid.SaveNotRunnning: Load a save to see how many raids are queued by the mod.
LanguageData.SplitTheRaid.SilenceWarningsTooltip: Suppress warning messages from this mod. Errors will still be shown.
